description_long: This is a stylized doll with a youthful, anime-inspired appearance, featuring large pink twin-tailed hair styled in thick, curled pigtails. The doll wears a black tube top with a white frill trim and a small white cat face motif, paired with matching black panties adorned with white bows and frills at the hips. Thigh-high black stockings with heart-shaped cutouts and pink accents cover the legs, while the arms and torso are bare, revealing a pale, smooth skin tone. The face is characterized by large, closed eyes, a small mouth, and a neutral expression, with no visible eyebrows. The overall build is slender and the proportions are exaggerated, typical of collectible or decorative dolls. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting a plastic or vinyl material.
description: A stylized anime-inspired doll with pink twin-tailed hair, black frilled clothing, and thigh-high stockings, featuring a smooth, pale complexion and a neutral facial expression.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the pink twin-tailed hair, the frilled black tube top, and the back of the stockings with heart cutouts.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the curled pigtails, the side of the tube top, and the slim arm and leg.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the doll's face with closed eyes, the cat motif on the tube top, and the full detail of the stockings and bows.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile of the hair, arm, and leg, with visible frills and bows.
attribute_clothing_style: Anime-inspired fashion with a black frilled tube top featuring a white cat face motif, matching black panties with white bows and frills, and thigh-high black stockings with heart-shaped cutouts and pink accents.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and close together, head facing forward, and torso upright in a static pose.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral facial expression with closed eyes, small mouth, and no visible eyebrows.
attribute_hair_style: Thick, voluminous pink hair styled in twin pigtails with large, curled sections and a short fringe.
